title: ASR Outdoor Collapsible Silicone 10 Liter Gold Panning Water Bucket Container
description:

ASR Outdoor Collapsible Silicone 10 Liter Gold Panning Water Bucket Container

An ASR Outdoor gold panning essential item, this collapsible silicone bucket is meant to pair seamlessly with the ASR Outdoor green classifier screens or sieves, in order to help you efficiently and effectively sift out unwanted raw materials form your working mineral deposit. And, not only is this gold panning bucket great for sorting your materials in the field, its sturdy plastic handle makes it a handy item to have for carrying equipment, moving water and much more when you’re on site.

Easy to use, transport and store, the collapsible silicone bucket features a purposefully compact and thoughtful design:

Key Features

  • COLLAPSIBLE GOLD PANNING BUCKET: This ASR Outdoor bucket, while incredibly versatile in nature, is meant to work seamlessly with the ASR Outdoor green classifier sieves or screens for gold panning, gold mining and gold prospecting in order to help sift out raw materials from your mineral deposit; high capacity of 10L/2.65 gallons
  • COMPACT DESIGN: Folding down to just two (2) inches when completely collapsed, the silicone bucket fits easily into your backpack, closet, car, tote bag and more; maintains shape and material integrity after repeated folding and reopening; sturdy plastic rim, base and carrying handle for added durability
  • BPA FREE SILICONE: This rubber, multipurpose tool bucket is BPA (Bisphenol-A) free, meaning there are no harmful chemicals in the silicone material; safe to use with drinking water, with little ones and pets; non-toxic and odorless with sturdy plastic handle for carrying and toting
  • MULTIPURPOSE: From beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood, cleaning supplies and beach toys carrier, to gardening or fishing bucket, water carrier or car wash bucket, this ASR Outdoor rubber silicone bucket is incredibly versatile and handy to have around the house, at the cabin or in the car for a variety of different tasks and activities
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions Opened: 12 inches x 10 inches; Dimensions Collapsed: 12 inches x 2 inches; Color: White/Grey; Capacity: 10L or 2.64 gallons; Material: BPA free silicone rubber; Plastic handle included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 10LCGPBORG
  • UPC: 810058486134
  • Color: Grey
  • Size: 10 L

COLLAPSIBLE: The bucket folds down to just two inches when completely collapsed, great for saving space when it’s not in use! And, it easily fits into a backpack, closet, car, tote bag, beach bag and more too. Notably, the silicone and plastic grey and white collapsible bucket will maintain its shape and structural material integrity after repeated folding and reopening

FUNCTIONAL: A sturdy plastic bottom rim, top rim and carrier handle make this silicone collapsible bucket easy to maneuver; the bucket features a handle groove for grip, as well as a groove on the bucket mouth so you can control the directional flow of water. The bucket also has a handy hook you can employ to hang when not in use

BPA-FREE: This rubber, multipurpose tool bucket is BPA (Bisphenol-A) free, meaning there are no harmful chemicals in the silicone material. The bucket is safe to use for drinking water and with little ones and pets; non-toxic and odorless

The collapsible, flexible pail bucket can also be used for many other chores, tasks and activities! From beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood, cleaning supplies and beach toys carrier, to gardening or fishing bucket, water carrier or car wash bucket, this ASR Outdoor rubber silicone bucket is multipurpose tool and incredibly handy to have around the house, at the cabin or in the car to name just a few!

Total Capacity: 10 Liters / 2.65 Gallons
